id.description: Unique identifier for the custom object definition

descriptor.description: Display name of the custom object type

name.description: The API name of the custom object type

description.description: Description of the custom object type

instanceType.description: Whether this is a single-instance or multi-instance custom object

parentObjectType.description: The standard Workday object type this custom object extends

fields.description: The fields defined in this custom object

isActive.description: Whether the custom object definition is active

createdOn.description: Timestamp when the definition was created

lastModified.description: Timestamp when the definition was last modified
